stance.title: Our Stance
stance.content: We do not predict the market; we quantify anomalies. All indicators are calculated from objective data without subjective judgment. We represent no institutional interests and operate independently. We present both bullish and bearish arguments to avoid becoming a one-sided "panic machine".

limitations.title: Limitations
items: History does not repeat — past patterns may not recur
Models are lagging — indicators reflect known information
Black swans are unpredictable — extreme events exceed model scope
Data may contain errors — some values are estimates

daily.title: Daily
daily.desc: Stock prices, FX rates, interest rates, VIX, commodity prices

weekly.title: Weekly
weekly.desc: Sentiment, capital flows, northbound funds, margin data

monthly.title: Monthly / Quarterly
monthly.desc: PMI, employment, fiscal data, bank NPLs, developer debt
